headline: How The Travelers (TRV) Story Is Shifting On AI, Reserves And Mixed Analyst Targets
summary: The updated fair value estimate for Travelers Companies has shifted slightly from US$302.05 to US$303.23 per share, a small move that still matters if you are tracking price targets closely. Behind this, recent research has been split, with some analysts lifting targets into the low to mid US$300s while others cut theirs into the mid US$200s, reflecting very different views on underwriting, reserves, and pricing conditions in key lines. Read on to see how you can interpret these moving...
